narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: अमेरिका और ब्रिटेन पर होगा परमाणु हमला, नाटो की धमकी के बाद पुतिन ने दे दी चेतावनी
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: The text evokes fear or anxiety about potential threats, dangers or reactions by mentioning a possible nuclear attack on America and Britain.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: पुतिन ने कहा कि अगर ये देश यूक्रेन को रूस पर हमला करने देंगे तो वे उन देशों पर हमला कर देंगे
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: The text portrays Russia as being unfairly targeted or victimized by suggesting that it is being forced to defend itself against potential attacks from other countries.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: यूक्रेन आक्रामक मूड में है और अमेरिका और ब्रिटेन की मदद से रूस पर ड्रोन हमले कर रहा है
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: The text predicts or makes assumptions about the potential results or consequences of a conflict by mentioning Ukraine's aggressive mood and its attacks on Russia with the help of America and Britain.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: एस हालात में रहस कर सकता है कि रहस कर सकता है कि एमरिका और ब्रिटेन पर होगा परमाणु हमला
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: The text mentions that Russia might launch a nuclear attack on the US and Britain if they allow Ukraine to attack Russia, which amplifies war-related fears.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: अमेरिका के साथ ब्रिटेन पर होगा परमाणु हमला
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: The text mentions a potential nuclear attack on America and Britain, which evokes fear and anxiety about severe consequences, fitting the definition of amplifying war-related fears.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: रुस के राष्ट्रपति व्लादिमिर पुतिन ने कहा कि उन्हेन रुस पर हमला किे जाने विरुद्ध देश को शिकायत विरोधि देश समरथन करेगा
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: The text portrays Russia as being unfairly targeted and victimized by the West, with Putin warning of potential nuclear attacks, which fits the definition of Russia being the victim.
